sentences.arabic: التَّنَفُّسُ الْعَمِيقُ يُهَدِّئُ الإِنْسَانَ حِينَ يَتَوَتَّرُ.
sentences.translation: Duboko disanje smiruje čovjeka kada se uznemiri.
sentences.translationEn: Deep breathing calms a person down when they feel tense.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرَتْ مُنَى بِتَوَتُّرٍ شَدِيدٍ قَبْلَ الْمُقَابَلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Muna je osjetila jak stres prije razgovora za posao.
sentences.translationEn: Muna felt strong tension before the interview.

sentences.arabic: أَغْمَضَتْ عَيْنَيْهَا وَتَنَفَّسَتْ بِبُطْءٍ عَشْرَ مَرَّاتٍ.
sentences.translation: Zatvorila je oči i polako disala deset puta.
sentences.translationEn: She closed her eyes and breathed slowly ten times.

sentences.translation: Srce joj se smirilo i ušla je s pouzdanjem.
sentences.translationEn: Her heart calmed down and she entered with confidence.
